note: DS-wide 掃 components/**/*.tsx(非 story):5 檔含 placeholder:text-fg-muted(SelectMenu / DatePicker / Field field-wrapper / Textarea / Command)全部具備 disabled override(disabled:placeholder:text-fg-disabled OR group-data-[field-mode=disabled]/field:placeholder:text-fg-disabled OR resolvedMode==='disabled'&&text-fg-disabled)。A.4 第二偵測(<span text-fg-muted>{placeholder} 不分 mode)亦 0。= 0 殘留(M24 disabled>muted precedence 全守)。
